feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1836 201 1635 79
TR 1688 172 1516 64

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Chemistry Periodic Table 2026
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺249,99 [Free ~ ₺899,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

Discover the Periodic Table like never before with our innovative 3D app! Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of elements in a completely new and visually stunning way. Our app offers you a minimalist and captivating experience that will make exploring the Periodic Table a uniquely engaging journey. With our intuitive interface and minimalist design, you can effortlessly navigate through the elements. Each element comes to life in a captivating 3D environment, allowing you to visualize its structure in a way you've never experienced before. Witness how elements interact with each other and uncover their properties in a completely new light. Want to learn more about a specific element? Our app provides detailed and easily understandable information about each element, covering everything from its physical and chemical properties to its history and practical uses. Learning about the Periodic Table has never been so accessible and exciting. Perfect for students, professionals, and science enthusiasts alike, our app caters to all. Whether you're studying chemistry or simply curious about the world of elements, our 3D app offers an educational and entertaining experience. Download now and dive into the beauty of the Periodic Table in a way you never imagined. Explore, learn, and marvel at the elements with our 3D app today!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: ScoreMaster - Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Say goodbye to messy pen and paper! ScoreMaster is an all-in-one app designed specifically for board game and card game players. We handle the tedious calculations and physical accessories so you can focus 100% on the fun of the game. Perfectly Supports All Your Favorite Games: * Classic Board Games: Catan, Carcassonne, Rummikub * Card Games & Poker: Poker, Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh! * Party & Social Deduction: Werewolf, Avalon, Codenames * RPGs: Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) and any custom scoring games Six Core Features: * Intuitive Scoring: Supports multiple players. Add or subtract points with a single tap on a clean, distraction-free interface. * Match History: Automatically saves final scores and historical match records for every game you play. * First Player Selector: Multiple players touch the screen to randomly pick the starting player in just one second. * Random Dice Roller: Built-in virtual dice. Roll instantly with a tap—never worry about forgetting physical dice again. * Countdown Timer: Customizable sand timer, essential for time-limited party games and trivia. * Versus Timer (Chess Clock): Dedicated 2-player turn timer. Say goodbye to slow play and keep competitive matches fair. Download ScoreMaster today and make your next game night smoother and more professional!

entry.title: Is This Seat Taken?
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Window seat or aisle? Booth or table? Lone wolf or life of the party? In Is This Seat Taken?, your mission is to organize groups of people according to their preferences. It’s a cozy, no-pressure logic puzzle game where you’re in charge of who sits where. Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement! Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat's heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm. - Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters. - Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between. - Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards. - Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

entry.title: Pasha Planet: Reborn
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

“Pasha Planet: Reborn” is the debut game of Scorpio Game, a Taiwanese independent game development studio. Prepare to be charmed by unique hand-painted scenes and have fun with light detective work, players will get to explore the main game plot that revolves around the characters’ daily life through an immersive and one-of-a-kind puzzle-solving gameplay. [Game Overview] The story takes place on the distant planet of Pasha. A prosperous underground city, which are inhabited by adorable doggies, can be found there. They live in peace day after day, enjoying the convenience brought about by technology. However, the protagonist Bobbie, who grew up in the city, often fantasizes about getting out of the closed-off Underground City to see the world outside. This is where the main story line of the game begins. Players will take on the role of Bobbie and explore the seemingly calm and peaceful city, which is in actual fact, facing an energy crisis. Players must clear stages of challenges to solve the final mystery and figure out a way to save all the inhabitants before disaster strikes! [Game Features] - Created by an independent game development studio in Taiwan. - Classic click-and-point puzzle-solving gameplay. - Charming and heartwarming hand-painted scenes. - Challenging puzzles and stages.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

√ Carpenter's level √ Supports iPhone and iPad Level. URL scheme is "EWBubbleLevel://"

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dungeon and Puzzles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

-- Awards: ● 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT: Official Selection ● Busan Indie Connect 2020: Excellence in Casual ● Bahamut 2020 ACG Creation Contest: Bronze Award About: Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves. There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms. To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move. Features: ● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban ● 150 handcrafted rooms ● Fantasy themed pixel art ● Non-linear dungeon map -- ● Follow us on Twitter https://twitter.com/nekolyst ● Like us on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Nekolyst ● Join our Discord server https://discord.gg/A7Sss9d

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: This Is the Police 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺54,99 → ₺11,99 [₺5,00 ~ ₺54,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺11,99

Application Description

IMPORTANT DOES NOT support: iPhone 5S, iPad Air, iPad Mini 2 & 3 and iPod Touch Interpret the law as you see fit in This Is the Police 2, sequel to the acclaimed noir drama This Is the Police! Run the sheriff’s department, manage your cops, investigate, interrogate, and incarcerate. Make tough decisions – and try to keep out of prison yourself! – in this story-driven mixture of adventure, strategy, and turn-based tactical combat. Is it a simulation? A management game? A tactical challenge? A visual novel? A puzzle? It’s all of these, and more! Dive into one-of-a-kind -story-driven experience. Welcome to Sharpwood, a cold and harsh border town riven with violence, where no one is completely innocent. Smugglers, gangs, and screaming populists call this town their home. To maintain peace and order, the young sheriff Lilly Reed (Sarah Hamilton) will have to team up with fugitive criminal Jack Boyd (Jon St. John), and pray that her dangerous plan doesn’t spiral out of control. Take charge of the Sheriff’s department. Your subordinates aren’t just some resource; they are living people with their own strengths, weaknesses, fears, and prejudices – and you'll have to reckon with all of them in order to survive. Is one of your guys drinking too much? Or always coming up with excuses for not coming to work? Or does he refuse to follow orders? You’ll have to show a steady hand if you want to impose discipline on this department. Engage in tactical combat. During your most dangerous operations, the game will switch to turn-based combat. Gather a team of your finest cops. Carefully study the terrain, adapt your plans, stealthily approach your suspects and use non-lethal weapons and equipment – if the situation allows. True, sometimes gunfights are almost impossible to avoid, but be careful: This Is the Police 2 doesn’t have hit points. A single bullet can cost a cop their life. Become a true detective. Collect evidence, study case materials, interrogate suspects and send the criminals to court. And if the suspect was innocent? Perhaps it's time to find out if any Sharpwood judges can be bought. Thank you for playing ‘THIS IS THE POLICE 2’! Get in touch with HandyGamesTM: www.handy-games.com Join us on Facebook: HandyGames Subscribe to our YouTube channel: HandyGames Check news on Twitter: @handy_games Follow us on Instagram: handygames Imprint: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Aces of the Luftwaffe Squadron
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺54,99 → ₺5,00 [₺5,00 ~ ₺54,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺5,00

Application Description

The Squadron has reached your mobile device! Dodge a bullet storm and face fearsome aerial war machines! Lead your squadron to victory in two different campaigns, full of story twists and legendary boss fights! ACES OF THE LUFTWAFFE - SQUADRON is an action-packed vertical scrolling shoot‘ em-up with a fascinating and fully voiced narrative. Dodge bullets, collect massive power-ups and wisely use special abilities to defeat your enemies. Two campaigns with 50 levels in total, waves of various deadly enemies and a lot of epic boss fights. Are you up to this task? When Europe seemed to be free, a secret German commando called The Aces of the Luftwaffe took their chance to strike back and invade the USA! It’s your duty to restore peace and liberty aboard deadly wings of steel in bombastic air battles! However, every story has two sides. While the Aces of Luftwaffe begin their assault on the United States, you are charged with leading a squad of elite German pilots on a secret mission. Embarc on an epic aerial adventure of intrigue and deceit from a secret base in the Bermuda Triangle. Choose your side, decide your role and take off! - Action-packed Shoot ’em up with explosive special effects - Heroic NPC wingmen that will follow your order - Skill trees with individual abilities for each wingman - Challenging achievement system - Captivating storyline with fully voiced characters - 50 levels and exciting missions  - 12 spectacular boss fights - Epic movie-like orchestral soundtrack

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 1942 Pacific Front Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺17,99 → ₺5,00 [₺5,00 ~ ₺17,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺5,00

In-App Purchases

  • 25,000 Gold：₺199,99
  • 60,000 Gold：₺499,99
  • 700,000 Gold：₺4.999,99
  • 325,000 Gold：₺2.499,99
  • 125,000 Gold：₺999,99

Application Description

The battle continues after “1941 Frozen Front” – and this time, it’s all about naval warfare! Join the navy and fight to win the battle of your life! Own the battlefield and send your soldiers to the frontline. Military combat at its best! Choose the right tactics and use your commando to defeat the enemy! Lead the U.S. Army on their campaign or command the Japanese forces on their mission! Take out enemy alliances with infantry, artillery, tanks, warplanes, battleships and submarines and earn your stripes as an ingenious commander at the PACIFIC FRONT! *** MISSION BRIEFING *** FIGHT with powerful weapons like torpedos and bombs! TAKE OUT enemy positions with tanks and infantry! BOMBARD hostile headquarters with mighty bomber wings! SURPRISE the enemy with attacks from your submarine! EMPLACE your artillery in rough terrain! CLEAR beaches, lagoons and straits! AMBUSH the enemy! SUPPLY your army with goods and ammunition! DEFEND your aircraft carriers and battleships! Features: - PLAY WITHOUT ADS! - Turn-based strategy action set in WW2 - Thrilling campaigns and challenging missions - Historical U.S. and Japanese units - Infantry, artillery, tanks, warplanes, battleships and submarines for both fractions - Repairs, camouflage and fortification of units during the battles - Hot-hand multiplayer battles - Hex grid for the best overview possible - Detailed graphics and super-realistic sounds - Full tablet support Thank you for playing ‘1942 Pacific Front’! © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Rotaeno
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺79,99 → ₺59,99 [Free ~ ₺79,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺59,99

In-App Purchases

  • 1030 Stellar Gems：₺449,99
  • 510 Stellar Gems：₺229,99
  • 100 Stellar Gems：₺39,99
  • 300 Stellar Gems：₺74,99
  • 2080 Stellar Gems：₺899,99

Application Description

Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience. Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure! =A Revolutionary Way to Experience Music= What sets Rotaeno apart is all in the name - rotation! Building on the basic controls of more traditional rhythm games, Rotaeno includes notes that require smooth turns and rapid rotations to hit, making it feel like you're drifting in a highspeed interstellar stunt race. It's a real arcade experience - in the palm of your hand! =Multi Genre Music and Beats= Rotaeno is loaded with exclusive tracks from renowned rhythm game composers. From EDM to JPOP, KPOP to Opera, the stylistically diverse song collection contains a future favorite song for every music lover! More songs are already planned for future updates and will be released on a regular basis. =A Journey to Find the Promised Land, Love, and Ourselves= Follow Ilot, our heroine, on a cosmic journey through the stars, and witness her growth as she sets out on her own. Follow in the footsteps of a friend, meet locals on different planets, and save the future of Aquaria! *Rotaeno will only function properly on devices that feature gyroscope or accelerometer support. Concerns or feedback? Contact us: rotaeno@xd.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: BfBB
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺69,99 → ₺11,99 [₺5,00 ~ ₺69,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺11,99

Application Description

Are you ready, kids? Play as SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy and show the evil Plankton that crime pays even less than Mr. Krabs. Want to save Bikini Bottom from lots of rampant robots with your mighty bubbles? Of course, you do! Want to underpants bungee jump? Why wouldn't you! The battle is on! Features: - Play as SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy and use their unique sets of skills - Thwart Plankton's evil plan to rule Bikini Bottom with his army of wacky robots - Meet countless characters from the beloved series - Faithful remake of one of the best SpongeBob games ever created - High-end visuals, modern resolutions, and carefully polished gameplay - Game Center support Thank you for playing SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom! Get in touch with HandyGamesTM: www.handy-games.com Join us on Facebook: HandyGames Subscribe to our YouTube channel: HandyGames Check news on Twitter: @handy_games Follow us on Instagram: handygames Imprint: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Code Blue – CPR & ACLS Timer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. # Core Features # DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality # Fully Customizable for Your Practice # CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour # First Responder & Post-Code Tools # FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review # Evidence-Based Flowcharts # ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines # Built for Healthcare Professionals # Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. # Support & Legal # For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Subnautica
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

Application Description

*Make sure to check if your device is supported before playing Subnautica!* Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you! Descend into the depths, craft equipment, pilot submarines and out-smart wildlife to explore lush coral reefs, volcanoes, cave systems, and more - all while trying to survive. Unravel the mystery of this world teeming with creatures, both friendly and hostile, scattered with clues from a previous time. Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. FEATURES • SURVIVE - After crash landing on a vast underwater planet, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore. • EXPLORE - Manage your hunger, thirst, and oxygen supply as you dive into towering kelp forests, sunlit plateaus, bio-luminescent reefs, and winding cave systems. • SCAVENGE - Collect resources from the ocean around you. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items. • CRAFT - Build bases to shelter in, vehicles to pilot, tools for survival to aid you in navigating and adapting to this subaquatic landscape. • DISCOVER - What happened to this planet? What caused you to crash? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive? • CUSTOMIZE - Play in Survival mode to experience the original challenge, or switch to Freedom or Creative mode to discover this oceanic planet without the pressures of thirst, hunger, or oxygen. CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE • Revamped interface – exclusive mobile UI with complete touch control • Game Center achievements • Cloud Save – Share your progress between iOS devices • Compatible with MFi controllers • iPhone 16 Optimization (including Pro Max) ----- *DEVICES NOT SUPPORTED (THE GAME WON'T WORK)*: - iPhone Xr, iPhone SE Gen 2 (2020) - iPad Mini Gen 5, iPad Air Gen 3, iPad Gen 8, iPad Gen 9 *SUPPORTED DEVICES ON LOW RESOLUTION ONLY*: - iPhone Xs, iPhone Xs Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Mini, iPhone SE Gen 3 (2022) - iPad Pro 10.5", iPad Mini Gen 6, iPad Air Gen 4, iPad Gen 10, iPad Pro 11" Gen 1, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 3 *SUPPORTED DEVICES* : - iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 14 AND ABOVE - iPad Pro 11" Gen 2, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 4, iPad Air Gen 5, iPad Pro 11" Gen 3, iPad Pro 11" Gen 4, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 5, iPad Pro 12.9" Gen 6 AND ABOVE

entry.title: Cluedo
entry.summary:
Whispering Pines Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
Black Adder Resort Bundle: ₺699,99 → ₺249,99
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺699,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺699,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺34,99

In-App Purchases

  • Ultimate Edition Upgrade：₺499,99
  • Ultimate Edition Sale：₺399,99
  • Welcome Offer：₺999,99
  • Legacy Suspect Pack：₺799,99
  • Suspects Bundle：₺1.499,99
  • Ultimate Edition：₺1.999,99
  • PolarStation Crime SceneBundle：₺249,99
  • Whispering Pines Bundle：₺249,99
  • Black Adder Resort Bundle：₺249,99
  • Epic Crime Collection content：₺999,99

Application Description

Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery. Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective. In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective! HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime! 2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! FEATURES - THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! - A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once. - MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. - ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
